libraryDescription:
This library, gui.HorizontalSliderWindow, provides a window containing arranged horizontal sliders as a GUI component.

In the standard VCSSL library GUI, GUI components are handled as int IDs, but the GUI component provided by this module is handled as theHorizontalSliderWindow struct.

The HorizontalSliderWindow struct internally stores resource IDs and related data, but you normally do not need to be aware of its internals becausefunctions for creating and destroying it are provided. Direct access to its members is not recommended.
Specifically, create it with the newHorizontalSliderWindow function and destroy it with thedeleteComponent function.

This module also provides overloads of standard GUI library functions so that the HorizontalSliderWindow struct can be handled almost in the sameway as in the standard library GUI.
For example, the mountComponent, setComponentSize, andsetComponentLocation functions are provided.

function0.name: newHorizontalSliderWindow
function0.declaration: HorizontalSliderWindow newHorizontalSliderWindow(int x, int y, int width, int height, string title, string labelText[ ], float defaultValue[ ], float minValue[ ], float maxValue[ ])
function0.parameters:
(int type) x : The X coordinate of the top-left corner of the window. 
(int type) y : The Y coordinate of the top-left corner of the window. 
(int type) width : The width of the window. 
(int type) height : The height of the window. 
(string type) title : The title of the window. 
(string[] type) labelText : The array storing the label text of all sliders. 
(float[] type) defaultValue : The array storing the default values of all sliders. 
(float[] type) minValue : The array storing the minimum values of all sliders. 
(float[] type) maxValue : The array storing the maximum values of all sliders.

function1.name: newHorizontalSliderWindow
function1.declaration: HorizontalSliderWindow newHorizontalSliderWindow(string labelText[ ], float defaultValue[ ], float minValue[ ], float maxValue[ ])
function1.description: Creates a slider window with its size determined automatically.
function1.parameters:
(string[] type) labelText : The array storing the label text of all sliders. 
(float[] type) defaultValue : The array storing the default values of all sliders. 
(float[] type) minValue : The array storing the minimum values of all sliders. 
(float[] type) maxValue : The array storing the maximum values of all sliders.

function4.name: deleteComponent
function4.parameters: (HorizontalSliderWindow type) windowInstance : The window to be destroyed.

function5.name: setTextLabelWidth
function5.description: Sets the width of the label area.
function5.parameters:
(HorizontalSliderWindow type) windowInstance : The target slider window. 
(int type) labelWidth : The width of the label area.

function6.name: setButton
function6.description: Displays a button at the bottom of the window.
function6.parameters:
(HorizontalSliderWindow type) windowInstance : The target window. 
(string type) label : The label text of the button.

function7.name: getButton
function7.description: Gets the GUI component ID of the button.
function7.returnValue: (int type) The GUI component ID of the button.

function8.name: getWindow
function8.description: Gets the GUI component ID of the window.
function8.returnValue: (int type) The GUI component ID of the window.

function9.name: getHorizontalSlider
function9.description: Gets the slider corresponding to the specified label.
function9.parameters:
(HorizontalSliderWindow type) windowInstance : The target window. 
(string type) labelText : The label text corresponding to the slider to get.
function9.returnValue: (int type) The GUI component ID of the slider.

function10.name: getHorizontalSlider
function10.description: Gets the slider at the specified index.
function10.parameters:
(HorizontalSliderWindow type) windowInstance : The target window. 
(int type) index : The index of the slider.
function10.returnValue: (int type) The GUI component ID of the slider.

function11.name: getComponentSize
function11.description: Returns the size of the window.
function11.returnValue: (int[] type) The array storing the size of the window.

function12.name: setComponentSize
function12.declaration: void setComponentSize(HorizontalSliderWindow &windowInstance, int width, int height)
function12.description: Sets the size of the window.
function12.parameters:
(HorizontalSliderWindow type) windowInstance : The target window. 
(int type) width : The width. 
(int type) width : The height.
function12.returnValue: (void type) The array storing the size of the window.

function13.name: setComponentSize
function13.description: Automatically adjusts the sizes of the internal components to match the current window size. Use this when the window size has been changed externally.

function14.name: getComponentLocation
function14.description: Returns the location of the window.
function14.returnValue: (int[] type) The array storing the location of the window.

function15.name: setComponentLocation
function15.description: Sets the location of the window.
function15.parameters:
(HorizontalSliderWindow type) windowInstance : The target window. 
(int type) x : The X coordinate of the top-left corner of the window. 
(int type) y : The Y coordinate of the top-left corner of the window.

function16.name: setComponentLocation
function16.description: Sets the location of the window.
function16.parameters:
(HorizontalSliderWindow type) windowInstance : The target window. 
(int type) x : The X coordinate of the window. 
(int type) y : The Y coordinate of the window.
